description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine setdiagresopf_3, and is implemented by a call to setdiagresopf_3. Use this API to specify the OPF annotation options in the active Slider diagram. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. setdiagresopf_2(setscope, opfbusvoltmag, opfbuspinj, opfbusqinj, opfloadsens, opffxssens, opfswssens)
python_syntax: setdiagresopf_2(setscope, opfbusvoltmag, opfbuspinj, opfbusqinj, opfloadsens, opffxssens, opfswssens)

parameters.name: setscope
parameters.description: Is the scope of the api. (input).

setscope.description: defaults for new diagrams and settings for the active diagram.
